atlas v0.5
Back To Movements

Historical Movement

Swiss / International Typographic Style

网格、对齐、无衬线、秩序感。它是今天大量知识型、设计型、档案型网页的基础语法之一。

Period

1950s-1970s

Origin

Switzerland

Why It Matters

如果你想做可扫描、可扩展、可归档的知识系统，Swiss 比“简单好看”更重要。

Core Traits

先理解这条语言本身

Principles

  • grid-first composition
  • alignment as primary device
  • type-led hierarchy
  • metadata clarity

Watchouts

  • 别把网格误解成呆板
  • 不能靠纯色块替代真正的秩序

Sample Gallery

历史语言在今天的网页里如何现身

Descendant Families

今天在网页里更接近哪些家族

Web Family

Swiss Typographic Grid

Order-forward, grid-led, typographic systems for archives, references, identities, and anything that must stay legible while it grows.

Historical Roots

Swiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

archivesidentity studiosreference libraries
Open family
Web Family

Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface

Thesis, evidence, navigation, and labels coexist. The page must remain trustworthy and scannable even when it gets dense.

Historical Roots

Bauhaus / Functional ModernismSwiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

research hubsdesign systemsguides
Open family

Reference Links

继续读历史和看案例

  • Print: Swiss Style Principles
